intent: A keyboard-only user (screen-reader or motor-accessibility need) traverses the site from home to the primary call-to-action using only Tab, Enter, and arrow keys. Every focusable element must be reachable and its focus state must be visible.
notes: Template P5-4 — keyboard-only traversal. Runner enforces focus-visible check at every step (finding rule: `focus-not-visible`). Any focusable element without a visible :focus ring is a hard finding. Mouse-only CTA buttons fail this journey.
